ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the vehicle */,
  "present_price" REAL /* Present price of the vehicle */,
  "kms_driven" INTEGER /* Kilometers driven by the vehicle */,
  "owner" INTEGER /* Number of previous owners */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_type_id") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "year_of_production" INTEGER /* Year the model was first produced */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales transaction */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales history */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales transaction */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "seller_email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the seller */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the seller */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the seller */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sellers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespersons" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "salesperson_name" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the salesperson */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the salesperson */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the salesperson */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the salesperson */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
